description: Shared determinism vector. Built identically by the Rust core (engine-core/tests/conformance.rs) and the TypeScript runtime (sdk/test/conformance.test.ts); both must produce this state hash.
steps: register Position { x: i64, y: i64 }  -> component 0
register Velocity { dx: i64, dy: i64 } -> component 1
register Health   { hp: u32, alive: bool } -> component 2
for i in 1..=6: Position{x:i, y:2i}, Velocity{dx:i, dy:-i}, Health{hp:100-10i, alive:i%2==1}
run Movement (reads Velocity, writes Position) for 3 full sweeps
